title: Some column types are not available on the API
excerpt:
Hello, the following column types are not supported on the API to create an item. 
Can these be included in the future versions? 
Thanks. 

Vote
Color Picker
Button
Files
Time Tracking

posts.author: kustrica35 (Emirio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, the following column types are not supported on the API to create an item.
Can these be included in the future versions?
Thanks.

  • Color Picker
  • Button
